title: DRC, Zambia Vow to Resolve Customs Delays for Trucks Hauling Copper, Cobalt
impact_evidence: Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Transport corridors and access road impacts -> "The railway systems which were created to get copper to the coast are dilapidated with trains moving at less than 35 kilometers an hour." | "This has seen bulk cargo spilling over on to the roads, we have seen more investment in the road sector, but these roads are not lasting they get damaged day in, day out despite billions of dollars being spent on these roads because bulk cargo is not designed to be moved on these fragile roads." || Social | Health, Safety & Well-being | Worker health and safety risks -> "He said it's dangerous because thieves can break in or steal fuel or parts from their trucks." | ""We are being robbed or attacked every now and then, more especially on the diesel issue and battery. Goods are not safe. No toilets; just a bush," said Kalaba." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation -> ""This impacts directly on government 's ability to collect revenue, which is so needed for the many things that we've lined up as a government to try and put this economy back on track." | "He estimates both Zambia and the DRC are losing more than half a million dollars per month from the border delays." || Social | Quality of Work Life | Labor conditions and workplace dignity -> ""The life of a truck driver, it has become so difficult … because just one journey or one trip from South Africa, even Tanzania, to go into DRC takes someone even maybe more than a month for him to return home," said Mumba." | "Driver Ediwn Kalaba is hauling copper to South Africa for export but has been stuck at the border for more than a week, sleeping in his truck." | ""We are being robbed or attacked every now and then, more especially on the diesel issue and battery. Goods are not safe. No toilets; just a bush," said Kalaba."
impact_level2: Land, Soil & Geology || Health, Safety & Well-being || Livelihoods & Economy || Quality of Work Life
impact_level3: Transport corridors and access road impacts || Worker health and safety risks || Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation || Labor conditions and workplace dignity
